home.hero_subtitle: Over 30 years connecting healthcare professionals with the finest medical products in Venezuela. Quality, safety, and trust in every delivery.
home.about_title: A legacy of trust in healthcare
home.about_text: AltusPoint was born from over 30 years of experience in the Venezuelan medical sector. What began as Innovaciones Médicas has evolved into a brand that represents excellence, innovation, and commitment to safety in healthcare. We are your strategic partner, combining wisdom, protection, and innovation.
home.about_quote: Our commitment is to the safety of every patient and every healthcare professional.
home.why_quality_desc: All our products meet the highest international quality standards. We work with globally recognized brands.
home.why_shipping_desc: We provide secure and fast shipping across Venezuela. Your order arrives protected and on time.
home.why_support_desc: Our team of experts with over 30 years of experience is available to guide you in choosing the ideal product.
home.cta_subtitle: Contact us today and discover how we can be your partner in medical equipment and supplies distribution.
home.distributor_title: Grow with us: Join the AltusPoint network
home.distributor_text: We're looking for strategic partners who share our vision of bringing top-quality medical products across Venezuela. If your company has a vocation for healthcare service, we want to meet you.
home.distributor_benefit_1_desc: Access to top-tier international brands with exclusive distribution in your area.
home.distributor_benefit_2_desc: Training, marketing materials, and ongoing technical guidance for your team.
home.distributor_benefit_3_desc: A solid business model with over 30 years of experience backing your operation.

distributors.hero_badge: 30+ years of experience | 8 product lines | National coverage
distributors.hero_title: Grow with AltusPoint: Join Venezuela's most trusted medical distribution network
distributors.hero_subtitle: Access certified international brands, territorial exclusivity, ongoing training, and the backing of over 30 years of experience in healthcare.
distributors.benefit_1_desc: Distribute brands like Molnlycke, Infinium, Ohio Medical, Medivaric, Exeol and BSN Medical with exclusivity in your area.
distributors.benefit_2_desc: All our products carry ISO, INVIMA and/or FDA certifications. Sell with the confidence of offering verified quality.
distributors.benefit_3_desc: Secure your geographic zone with an exclusivity agreement that protects your investment and your market.
distributors.benefit_4_desc: Receive technical training on each product line, sales techniques and market trends through monthly webinars.
distributors.benefit_5_desc: We provide catalogs, technical sheets, social media visuals and permanent commercial advisory.
distributors.benefit_6_desc: Over 30 years of experience back a solid business model with attractive margins and constant demand in healthcare.
distributors.brands_text: Strategic partnerships with the most recognized brands in the global medical sector.
distributors.lines_text: Over 100 products available across 8 specialized lines to cover all healthcare sector needs.
distributors.step_1_desc: Write to us via WhatsApp or fill out the form with your information and area of interest.
distributors.step_2_desc: Our team evaluates your profile, experience and geographic area to find the best opportunity.
distributors.step_3_desc: We define conditions, exclusive territory, distributor pricing and training plan.
distributors.step_4_desc: You receive your welcome kit, catalog access and start operating with AltusPoint's full support.
distributors.req_1: Legally established company or individual with commercial activity
distributors.req_2: Experience in healthcare or medical distribution (desirable, not required)
distributors.req_3: Logistics capacity to cover your geographic area
distributors.req_4: Commitment to quality and customer service
distributors.req_5: Willingness to participate in periodic training sessions
distributors.req_note: If you don't meet all requirements but have a vocation for healthcare service, we still want to meet you! Write to us and let's evaluate together.
distributors.testimonial_1_text: Working with AltusPoint gave us access to international brands that were previously impossible to get in our area. The technical and commercial support is exceptional.
distributors.testimonial_2_text: Territorial exclusivity was key to our decision. We know our investment is protected and we have a partner who backs us up.
distributors.testimonial_3_text: Monthly trainings keep us updated and give us tools to sell better. It's not just a supplier, it's a true business partner.
distributors.faq_1_q: What is the initial investment to become a distributor?
distributors.faq_1_a: The investment varies depending on the geographic area and selected product lines. Contact us for a personalized proposal.
distributors.faq_2_q: Do I need prior experience in the medical sector?
distributors.faq_2_a: It's desirable but not required. We offer a complete training program so you can learn each product and the market in depth.
distributors.faq_3_a: We assign an exclusive geographic zone where only you can distribute our products. Details are defined in the commercial agreement.
distributors.faq_4_q: What support do I receive as a distributor?
distributors.faq_4_a: You receive ongoing technical training, marketing materials, updated catalogs, WhatsApp commercial support and access to a private distributor group.
distributors.faq_5_a: We accept Bancolombia transfer, Pago Móvil, Zelle (Bank of America) and cryptocurrency (USDT via Binance BEP20).
distributors.faq_6_q: Does AltusPoint have coverage across all of Venezuela?
distributors.faq_6_a: Yes. Our headquarters are in San Cristóbal, Táchira, with presence in Caracas, Valencia, Barquisimeto, Mérida, Margarita and Puerto Ordaz. We're actively expanding.
distributors.cta_subtitle: Join the AltusPoint distributor network and bring world-class medical products to your region.

footer.company: Medical equipment & supplies distributor. Over 30 years of experience serving healthcare professionals in Venezuela.
